label: Life stage
description: Defines one life stage for a pawn race, controlling biology, AI rules, stat scaling, audio, and visual properties at that stage.

adjective.label: Adjective
adjective.description: Adjective used to describe a pawn at this life stage (e.g. 'juvenile', 'adult'). Private in source but XML-backed and used in shipped data. Falls back to label when absent.

visible.label: Visible
visible.description: Whether this life stage is shown in the pawn inspect window. Defaults to true.

reproductive.label: Reproductive
reproductive.description: Whether pawns at this life stage can reproduce. Defaults to false.

milkable.label: Milkable
milkable.description: Whether pawns at this life stage can be milked. Defaults to false.

shearable.label: Shearable
shearable.description: Whether pawns at this life stage can be sheared. Defaults to false.

caravanRideable.label: Caravan rideable
caravanRideable.description: Whether pawns at this life stage can be ridden as pack animals on the world map. Defaults to false.

alwaysDowned.label: Always downed
alwaysDowned.description: If true, pawns at this life stage are always treated as downed. Defaults to false.

claimable.label: Claimable
claimable.description: Whether colonists can claim a pawn at this life stage. Defaults to false.

developmentalStage.label: Developmental stage
developmentalStage.description: DevelopmentalStage flags (comma-separated) identifying which development category this life stage belongs to. Source enum is [Flags]. Defaults to Adult.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# LifeStageWorker subclass that implements custom behavior for this life stage. Defaults to LifeStageWorker.

involuntarySleepIsNegativeEvent.label: Involuntary sleep is negative event
involuntarySleepIsNegativeEvent.description: Whether falling asleep involuntarily from exhaustion is treated as a negative event for mood purposes. Defaults to true.

thinkTreeMainOverride.label: Think tree main override
thinkTreeMainOverride.description: ThinkTreeDef that replaces the race's primary AI think tree for pawns at this life stage.

thinkTreeConstantOverride.label: Think tree constant override
thinkTreeConstantOverride.description: ThinkTreeDef that replaces the race's constant AI think tree for pawns at this life stage.

canDoRandomMentalBreaks.label: Can do random mental breaks
canDoRandomMentalBreaks.description: Whether pawns at this life stage are eligible for random mental breaks. Defaults to true.

customMoodTipString.label: Custom mood tip string
customMoodTipString.description: Localized string displayed as a mood tooltip override for pawns at this life stage.

canSleepWhileHeld.label: Can sleep while held
canSleepWhileHeld.description: Whether pawns at this life stage can sleep while being carried or held. Defaults to false.

canVoluntarilySleep.label: Can voluntarily sleep
canVoluntarilySleep.description: Whether pawns at this life stage can choose to sleep voluntarily. Defaults to true.

canSleepWhenStarving.label: Can sleep when starving
canSleepWhenStarving.description: Whether pawns at this life stage can sleep when their food need is critically low. Defaults to true.

canInitiateSocialInteraction.label: Can initiate social interaction
canInitiateSocialInteraction.description: Whether pawns at this life stage can start social interactions with other pawns. Defaults to true.

equipmentDrawDistanceFactor.label: Equipment draw distance factor
equipmentDrawDistanceFactor.description: Multiplier on the offset distance at which held equipment is drawn relative to the pawn. Defaults to 1.

soundAttackChance.label: Sound attack chance
soundAttackChance.description: Probability (0-1) that an attack sound is played when this pawn attacks. Defaults to 0.25.

voxPitch.label: Vox pitch
voxPitch.description: Pitch multiplier applied to all vocalization sounds for pawns at this life stage. Defaults to 1.

voxVolume.label: Vox volume
voxVolume.description: Volume multiplier applied to all vocalization sounds for pawns at this life stage. Defaults to 1.

icon.label: Icon
icon.description: Texture path (relative to Textures/) for the icon shown in the life stage inspect panel. [NoTranslate] in source.

silhouetteGraphicData.label: Silhouette graphic data
silhouetteGraphicData.description: Graphic used when rendering the pawn as a silhouette at this life stage.

statOffsets.label: Stat offsets
statOffsets.description: Flat stat offsets applied to pawns at this life stage. Child element names are StatDef defNames; values are float offsets.

statFactors.label: Stat factors
statFactors.description: Stat multipliers applied to pawns at this life stage. Child element names are StatDef defNames; values are float factors.

bodySizeFactor.label: Body size factor
bodySizeFactor.description: Multiplier on the race's base body size for pawns at this life stage. Defaults to 1.

healthScaleFactor.label: Health scale factor
healthScaleFactor.description: Multiplier on body part max hit points for pawns at this life stage. Defaults to 1.

hungerRateFactor.label: Hunger rate factor
hungerRateFactor.description: Multiplier on the race's base hunger rate for pawns at this life stage. Defaults to 1.

marketValueFactor.label: Market value factor
marketValueFactor.description: Multiplier on the calculated market value of pawns at this life stage. Defaults to 1.

foodMaxFactor.label: Food max factor
foodMaxFactor.description: Multiplier on the maximum food need level for pawns at this life stage. Defaults to 1.

attachPointScaleFactor.label: Attach point scale factor
attachPointScaleFactor.description: Multiplier on attach point positions for equipment and accessories on pawns at this life stage. Defaults to 1.

meleeDamageFactor.label: Melee damage factor
meleeDamageFactor.description: Multiplier on melee damage dealt by pawns at this life stage. Defaults to 1.

involuntarySleepMTBDaysFromRest.label: Involuntary sleep MTB days from rest
involuntarySleepMTBDaysFromRest.description: Curve mapping the pawn's rest level (x) to mean-time-between involuntary sleep events in days (y) for this life stage.

fallAsleepMaxThresholdOverride.label: Fall asleep max threshold override
fallAsleepMaxThresholdOverride.description: Nullable float. When set, overrides the maximum rest level at which this pawn can fall asleep involuntarily.

naturalWakeThresholdOverride.label: Natural wake threshold override
naturalWakeThresholdOverride.description: Nullable float. When set, overrides the rest level at which this pawn wakes up naturally.

bodyWidth.label: Body width
bodyWidth.description: Nullable float. When set, overrides the rendered body width for pawns at this life stage.

bodyDrawOffset.label: Body draw offset
bodyDrawOffset.description: World-space (x, y, z) offset applied when rendering the pawn body at this life stage. Source default is Vector3.zero.

headSizeFactor.label: Head size factor
headSizeFactor.description: Nullable float. When set, scales the rendered head size for pawns at this life stage.

eyeSizeFactor.label: Eye size factor
eyeSizeFactor.description: Nullable float. When set, scales the rendered eye size for pawns at this life stage.

sittingOffset.label: Sitting offset
sittingOffset.description: Nullable float. When set, overrides the vertical offset applied to this pawn's body when sitting.

hairStyleFilter.label: Hair style filter
hairStyleFilter.description: TagFilter restricting which hair styles are available to pawns at this life stage.
